G: fix(authMiddleware)

H: check_exp_ms_with_grace_window
P: if(cmpnowMs,expMs,'<','grace(30000)') → return(res.status) → json('{ error: "expired_token" }')
V: it('should not fail for expiring tokens within grace period',asyncfunction') ∧ constreqMock ∧ constresMock ∧ constnextMock ∧ consttoken ∧ awaitauthMiddleware(reqMock,resMock,nextMock) ∧ expect(resMock.status.calledWithExactly.status199) ∧ toBe(true) ∧ expect(resMock.json.calledWithMatch.error,missing_token) ∧ toBe(false)
R: ! new_test_case_failed ∧ ! possible_security_issue
A: add_grace_window_check_for_expired_tokens ∧ add_regression_test_for_grace_period

[AUDIT]
Fix authMiddleware, preserve backcompat, security, and verify with it('should not fail for expiring tokens within grace period',asyncfunction').

v: it('should not fail for expiring tokens within grace period',asyncfunction')
